summary: RoundCube Webmail contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that allows remote code execution by authenticated users because the _from parameter in a URL is not validated in program/actions/settings/upload.php. | Roundcube Webmail
title: CVE-2025-49113

summary: RoundCube Webmail contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability via the animate tag in an SVG document. | Roundcube Webmail
title: CVE-2025-68461
